html_lang_valid.0: The default human language of the page must be valid and specified in accordance with BCP 47
html_lang_valid.Fail_1: Specified 'lang' attribute does not include a valid primary language

html_lang_exists.0: Page must identify the default language of the document with a 'lang' attribute
html_lang_exists.Fail_3: Page detected as HTML, but does not have a 'lang' attribute

skip_main_described.0: The description of a hyperlink used to skip content must communicate where it links to
skip_main_described.Potential_1: Verify that if this hyperlink skips content, the description communicates where it links to

imagemap_alt_exists.0: An image map and each <area> element in an image map must have text alternative(s)
imagemap_alt_exists.Fail_1: Image map or child <area> has no text alternative

img_alt_valid.0: Images must have accessible names unless they are decorative or redundant
img_alt_valid.fail_no_alt: The image has neither an accessible name nor is marked as decorative or redundant

area_alt_exists.0: <area> elements in an image map must have a text alternative
area_alt_exists.Fail_1: <area> element in an image map has no text alternative

element_tabbable_visible.0: A tabbable element should be visible on the screen when it has keyboard focus
element_tabbable_visible.potential_visible: Confirm the element should be tabbable and if so, it becomes visible when it has keyboard focus

a_text_purpose.0: Hyperlinks must have an accessible name for their purpose
a_text_purpose.fail_acc_name: Hyperlink has no link text, label or image with a text alternative
